name: rtk
description: Local Codex wrapper for installing and maintaining Rust Token Killer.

interface.shortDescription: Install RTK, deinit Codex integration, or uninstall the RTK CLI.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex wrapper that installs RTK, deinitializes only its Codex integration when requested, or uninstalls the RTK CLI from the machine while preserving RTK's upstream project links.
defaultPrompt: Use the rtk-install skill to install RTK for Codex on this machine, run the global Codex init step `rtk init -g --codex`, and verify it with `rtk init -g --codex --show`.
Use the rtk-deinit skill to remove only RTK's Codex integration while keeping the RTK CLI installed.
Use the rtk-uninstall skill to remove the RTK CLI from the machine and warn that other agents may still rely on it.
